title: jasione amethystina f. microcephala
intro: Jasione amethystina f. microcephala, also known as the small-headed bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the bellflower family (Campanulaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Jasione amethystina f. microcephala include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular natural remedy for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
